ars-plan.description: Plan an academic paper through ARS plan mode.
ars-plan.template: Use ARS academic-paper plan mode. Task: $ARGUMENTS

ars-outline.template: Use ARS academic-paper outline-only mode. Task: $ARGUMENTS

ars-abstract.template: Use ARS academic-paper abstract-only mode. Task: $ARGUMENTS

ars-lit-review.template: Use ARS literature review routing. If source discovery is needed, route to deep-research lit-review mode; otherwise route to academic-paper lit-review mode. Task: $ARGUMENTS

ars-citation-check.template: Use ARS academic-paper citation-check mode. Verify sources instead of assuming references are valid. Task: $ARGUMENTS

ars-disclosure.description: Prepare AI-use or research disclosure text.
ars-disclosure.template: Use ARS academic-paper disclosure mode. Task: $ARGUMENTS

ars-format-convert.description: Plan or perform academic format conversion.
ars-format-convert.template: Use ARS academic-paper format-convert mode. Task: $ARGUMENTS

ars-revision-coach.description: Turn reviewer feedback into a revision plan.
ars-revision-coach.template: Use ARS academic-paper revision-coach mode. Task: $ARGUMENTS

ars-revision.description: Revise a draft with ARS revision mode.
ars-revision.template: Use ARS academic-paper revision mode. Task: $ARGUMENTS

ars-full.template: Use ARS academic-pipeline full workflow. If the topic is vague, begin with Socratic research-question scoping before drafting. Task: $ARGUMENTS
